creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
Most recent ports update (Revision: 411996) results on CURRENT (FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT #2 r297313: Sun Mar 27 12:12:41 CEST 2016 amd64) in a linker error compiling net/samba43 after also security/gnutls had been updated (see below). The problem occurs on every CURRENT installation I have access to and is also seen in a local poudriere installation:

[...]
